  • Uses of OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc

    Methods in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc that return OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder
    OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder.cardinality(ChildCardinality cardinality)
    Sets the shared per-order line-count cardinality (required).
    OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder
    OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder.deliveredThreshold(int deliveredThreshold)
    Orders with o_id <= deliveredThreshold are delivered (timestamp); the rest are undelivered (NULL).
    OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder
    OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder.ordersPerDistrict(int ordersPerDistrict)
    Sets the number of orders per district, used to wrap the parent o_id walker.
